title: Wire read-only task ledger queries
current_step: Read-only task status and event commands are available.
summary: Implemented task status and task events queries over JSONL ledger files while preserving read-only CLI boundaries.

evidence.description: Task query module and CLI handlers were added.
CLI tests passed for status, events, JSON output, and missing-task handling.

next_action: Add local real ledger examples and keep queries read-only.

title: Add policy profile selection
current_step: Policy profile selection is available through --policy-profile.
summary: Added profile-based policy loading for s-black, wangcai, dabai, or all, and fixed duplicated global argparse defaults.

evidence.description: Full test suite passed after adding profile selection.
Policy profile limits unrelated policy findings in action checks.

next_action: Commit and push the profile selection change.
